Notice Of Application And Hearing For Right To Attach Order And Writ Of Attachment
Off Calendar Jul-01-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance:
Elizabeth Macdonald, Esq., for Plaintiff and moving party: CREDITORS TRADE ASSOCIATION INC.
W. Lance Russum, Esq., for Defendant and opposing party: Joseph S. Scalise ind/as guarantor of joe Scalise, Jr & Sons, Inc.

After hearing, PLAINTIFF CREDITORS TRADE ASSOCIATION INC.'s Application For Writ Of Attachment is granted. Order signed in open court. Commissioner Everett A. Hewlett. Not reported.

Notice Of Application And Hearing For Right To Attach Order And Writ Of Attachment
Off Calendar Jun-25-2010 Continued To Jul-01-10 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance:
Elizabeth MacDonald, Esq., Specially appearing for Plaintiff and moving party: Creditors Trade association, Inc.
W. Lance Russum, Esq., for Defendant and opposing party: Joe Calise Jr & Sons Inc.

After hearing, tentative ruling is adopted. PLAINTIFF CREDITORS TRADE ASSOCIATION INC DBA WESTERN's Notice Of Application And Hearing For Right To Attach Order And Writ Of Attachment, is continued to July 1, 2010 at 10:30 a.m. in Dept. 610.
Further declaration to be served by June 29, 2010. Commissioner Everett A. Hewlett. Not reported.
